boxName: Driver’s Side Instrument Panel Fuse Block
boxDescription:
Some fuses are in a fuse block on the driver’s side of the instrument panel.
Pull off the cover labeled FUSES to expose the fuses.

Some fuses are in a fuse block on the passenger’s side of the instrument panel. Pull off the cover labeled FUSES to expose the fuses.Additional fuses are in the underhood electrical center on the passenger’s side of the engine compartment.
